description: Managed crypto market infrastructure for AI agents — 369 callable tools across 10 categories from Alchemy, CoinGecko, DeFiLlama, Moralis, Codex, GoPlus, Helius, Tenderly, and CCXT. MCP server + CLI for Claude Desktop, Cursor, OpenAI Responses API, VS Code, Windsurf, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI.

HIVE_API_KEY.description: Hive API key for live tool execution. Tool discovery works without a key; create a free key at https://hiveintelligence.xyz/dashboard/keys.
